query:
ALTER TABLE `opportunities` 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `adminReviewStatus` ENUM('pending_review', 'approved', 'rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending_review',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `adminReviewedAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `adminReviewedBy` INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `leadExpiresAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `routingQueue` TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `routingPosition` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `leadExpiresAt` TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `routingQueue` TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `routingPosition` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
